ACT-001.name: Actualization Preserves Admissibility
ACT-001.notes:
First verified theorem in the TRT Lean core. Holds by construction in the present
model; deriving it from a dynamics is belt work.
ACT-001.risk_if_false: If A could actualize inadmissible structure, the gate fails and L₃ would not govern χ.
ACT-001.statement:
Actualizing action A maps admissible structure to actual structure; every
actual structure is L₃-admissible (the gate between representable and actual is L₃).

EXT-001.name: LRT Formal Core (imported)
EXT-001.notes:
PLANNED import (stage 2) — see formalization/lrt/README.md. Status flips to verified
once vendored and lake-built green under v4.28.0 / Mathlib v4.28.0.
EXT-001.risk_if_false: If the imported proofs do not build under the matched toolchain, the L₃ formal backbone is unavailable.

LOG-001.name: L₃ as Admissibility Constraint
LOG-001.risk_if_false: If L₃ is merely conventional, the hard core loses its transcendental warrant.
LOG-001.statement:
The finite laws {Identity, Non-Contradiction, Excluded Middle} are not
conventions but admissibility constraints marking the boundary between coherent
actuality and incoherent pseudo-state.

LOG-002.name: Denial of L₃ is Self-Refuting
LOG-002.risk_if_false:
This is what makes TRT's hard core stronger than an orthodox Lakatosian core.
If the transcendental argument fails, immunity falls back to mere convention.
LOG-002.statement:
L₃ is immune by necessity, not convention: its denial deploys identity and
non-contradiction to be stated at all (demonstration by refutation, not derivation).

ONT-001.name: Central Identity χ ≡ A(I∞ | L₃)
ONT-001.notes: Stated narratively in the paper; encoded as the carrier Chi in the Lean core.
ONT-001.risk_if_false:
The central identity is the programme's hard core. Its failure is not a belt
adjustment but abandonment of TRT as such.
ONT-001.statement:
Actual reality χ is infinite informational potential constrained by finite
logic through actualizing action: χ ≡ A(I∞ | L₃).

ONT-002.name: Three Co-Requiring Primitives
ONT-002.notes: Co-requirement is metaphysical, not definitional — dependency graph acyclic (paper §9.2).
ONT-002.risk_if_false:
If the three reduce to fewer (or the co-requirement is definitional, hence
circular), the economy claim and the synthetic-necessity argument collapse.
ONT-002.statement:
L₃ (finite logical constraint), I∞ (infinite informational potential), and A
(actualizing action) are mutually co-requiring constituents of actualized
reality; each is characterizable on its own terms, none obtains in isolation.

ONT-003.name: Four-Tier Engine
ONT-003.risk_if_false:
The four-tier distinction is the load-bearing engine (dialetheism, superposition,
PBR, measurement, black holes). Without it those treatments fail jointly.
ONT-003.statement:
Informational structure is stratified: representable (well-formed, incl.
contradiction) ⊃ admissible (survives L₃) ⊃ actual (A-realized) with
outcome-actual reserved for determinate measurement results.

ONT-004.name: Synthetic Necessity of the Triad
ONT-004.notes: Carries the load-bearing metaphysical posit (actuality != possibility), stated openly per the methodology.
ONT-004.risk_if_false:
If the necessity is merely analytic (true by definition of "actualized reality"),
the economy claim is stipulation, not a substantive feature of the actual.
ONT-004.statement:
Given that something is actually real, it necessarily exhibits all three
constituents; the necessity is synthetic, not analytic — the three come apart
under analysis into three distinct failure modes (determinacy, differentiation,
actuality). Rests on one explicit posit: actuality is a genuine status distinct
from possibility.

computation.result:
Reproduces (deterministic, no fitted params) on the verified Feller et al. 2020
model, Eqs.(3)-(4). All three tested measure-free criteria are non-discriminating:
(i) commutant {a,a†,N,H}' = C·Id (dim 1, N=8..64) -> no DFS; (ii) Fock/coherent
pointer states lie in the complement (residual sqrt(2n+1)); (iii) [D_n,D_a]=0 to
machine precision (reproduces paper Eq.17) -> pairwise-commuting set is the whole
space. NEGATIVE result for the tested criteria (not a proof no measure-free
criterion can discriminate). Red-Team verified correctness HIGH; scope MEDIUM-HIGH.

OPN-001.name: Formalize Co-Admissibility (Task 0.1)
OPN-001.notes:
Root of the dependency graph. May be a computational rather than a Lean-proof object.
Attempt 1 (2026-06-26, agent roster): a measure-free criterion C0 = ker(Lindbladian)
exists (dissipative port of the flatness=kernel result) but degenerates to a single
steady state in the incompatible-channel regime; re-inflating to the pointer family
reintroduces a witness UNLESS the commutant {Lk,Lk^dag,H}' is nontrivial — and even
then the DFS likely targets the protected, not the decohering, sector. A weaker
pairwise-commuting-dissipator criterion (more L3-faithful) is untested. proof_status
advanced open->prose_only (a written construction now exists); epistemic stays OPEN
(the central measure-independence-where-it-discriminates question is unresolved — both
Red-Team and Peer-Review declined a move to 'argued'). Decisive next artifact: the
two-part commutant + pointer-location computation over the Feller cavity model. The
norm the relaxation needs is the same L2-residual as the gravity quadratic horn — ties
to OPN-002.
Attempt 2 (2026-06-26, computation; see formal_artifacts): the decisive computation ran.
All three tested measure-free objects are NON-DISCRIMINATING on the real model —
commutant trivial (no DFS), pointer states in the complement, pairwise-commuting set =
whole space (reproduces Feller Eq.17). Structural diagnosis: the tested objects are
algebraic/rate-independent but the pointer family is rate-governed (kappa_n/kappa_a~1),
so they cannot track it; a surviving criterion would have to be rate-dependent and
generator-derived. SCOPE: recorded NEGATIVE for the TESTED criteria (the risk_if_false
outcome) — progressive resolution, NOT a proof no measure-free criterion can discriminate
(Red-Team checked the natural rate-dependent candidate, Liouvillian slow modes, which
also fails). Labels held: proof_status prose_only, epistemic open; positive move declined.
JD holds the final label call. Open sub-question: does any rate-dependent measure-free
object discriminate?
OPN-001.risk_if_false:
The gating task. If no formalization avoids a free measure, or every one reduces
to the einselection optimization, BOTH physics conjectures (PRD-001, PRD-002) lose
discriminating content and the programme collapses to re-description.
OPN-001.statement:
Define co-admissibility as a criterion C(constraints) → admissible set that is
well-defined, computable, and measure-independent (no free entanglement measure).

OPN-002.name: Actualization-Resolution Keystone
OPN-002.notes: The structural parallel between the gravity fork and measurement emerged from the relational-graph computation (MEDIUM).
OPN-002.risk_if_false:
Shared root of the Born-rule (2.2) and gravity (3.1) forks. If A is best-fit with
an imposed norm, the linear/GR route closes.
OPN-002.statement:
Characterize how A resolves unsatisfiable/unresolved admissible structure:
obstruction-registering (linear → GR, projective measurement-free) or best-fit
projective (quadratic → modified gravity, projective measurement).

OPN-003.name: Derivation / Recovery of Known Physics
OPN-003.risk_if_false: If no known physics is recovered in any limit, TRT remains ontology, not physics.
OPN-003.statement:
Reconstruct the familiar structures — Hilbert space, probability, the Born rule,
gauge symmetry, relativistic spacetime, field equations, conservation laws — from
the triadic foundation, in appropriate limits.

OPN-004.name: Derivation of the Born Measure
OPN-004.risk_if_false: If the measure must be assumed, TRT inherits the measurement problem's hard core unchanged (as conceded).
OPN-004.statement:
Derive the Born rule's form from constraints on actualizing action A across the
admissible→actual boundary, rather than assuming it; and address the hard residue
(why one admissible branch actualizes rather than another on a given occasion).

OPN-005.name: Dimensional Analysis (ontological A vs physical S)
OPN-005.risk_if_false: Without the S→A bridge, the variational apparatus and the energy-as-action-rate identification stay metaphorical.
OPN-005.statement:
Develop the relation between ontological action A, the physical action functional
S, energy, and time; justify the inference from the prominence of S in physics to
the ontological role of A (the S→A bridge).

OPN-006.name: Avoid Equivocation (define terms before use)
OPN-006.notes: Standing discipline (cross-cutting), tracked for visibility rather than closure.
OPN-006.risk_if_false: Equivocation silently smuggles unearned content across the formal/physical/metaphysical boundary.
OPN-006.statement:
Logic, information, and action carry different meanings across disciplines. TRT
must fix its terms before deploying them. Standing methodological discipline, not
a one-time resolvable result.

OPN-007.name: Theology / Metaphysics Boundary Discipline
OPN-007.notes: Standing discipline (cross-cutting), tracked for visibility rather than closure.
OPN-007.risk_if_false: An unannounced metaphysical posit operating as if it were physics would breach the methodology.
OPN-007.statement:
Keep formal, physical, and metaphysical claims distinct; state the one explicit
posit (actuality is a genuine status distinct from possibility, §9.3) openly.
Disclosure is the standard, not the absence of metaphysical commitment.

PRD-001.falsifies:
Refuted if the formalized criterion (a) reproduces the witness-dependence it was
meant to eliminate, (b) contradicts the analytic critical coupling at which
Fock-state optimality ends in the cavity-field case, or (c) yields no definite
prediction (showing interpretation, not physics). SHARPER ANTECEDENT HANDLE
(2026-06-26): (d) if the commutant {L_n,L_α,L_n^dag,L_α^dag,H}' is trivial across
the critical coupling, the measure-free kernel criterion degenerates to a unique
steady state and a witness is forced — refuting (a) without the full optimization;
and if the commutant is nontrivial but the einselected pointer states lie in its
orthogonal (decohering) complement rather than inside it, the measure-free object
is disjoint from the predicted structure — also refuting.
PRD-001.name: Co-Admissibility Conjecture (incompatible channels)
PRD-001.notes:
Becomes a prediction only once OPN-001 lands. Confidence LOW; one component UNCERTAIN.
Decisive test = the two-part commutant + pointer-location computation (see OPN-001
Attempt 1).
2026-06-26 (computation, OPN-001 Attempt 2): falsifier handle (d) is now COMPUTED on the
verified Feller model — the commutant {a,a†,N,H}' IS trivial across the coupling (no DFS)
AND the einselected pointer states lie in its complement. Both horns of (d) fire: the
tested measure-free criteria are non-discriminating, so the conjecture's discriminating
content is materially undermined FOR THOSE CRITERIA. Not marked refuted: the measure-free
design space is not exhausted (rate-dependent criteria largely untested; the one checked
— Liouvillian slow modes — also failed). epistemic_status held at 'conjectured'; the
refutation strength and any label move are JD's call. See co-admissibility-formalization.md
Attempt 2.
PRD-001.risk_if_false: If false, TRT's measurement account is re-description of decoherence, not new physics.
PRD-001.statement:
Under incompatible decoherence channels, the co-admissible set is fixed by the
channel constraint structure alone (no chosen entanglement witness), matching
einselection where it is witness-independent and differing computably where it is not.

PRD-002.falsifies:
Refuted if the formalized global-co-admissibility criterion is compatible with
multiple non-equivalent gravitational structures equally well, cannot distinguish
Einstein gravity from the broader generally-covariant class, or cannot recover the
black-hole area law (with coefficient) in the appropriate limit.
PRD-002.name: Gravity Linearity Test (GR vs modified gravity)
PRD-002.notes: Confidence that GR is recoverable conditional on linearity is MEDIUM (Regge existence proof); that linearity holds is UNCERTAIN.
PRD-002.risk_if_false: If the criterion underdetermines gravity, the gravity programme is interpretive, not derivational.
PRD-002.statement:
Whether co-admissibility is linear or quadratic in the holonomy deficit decides
GR (linear, no higher-curvature corrections) vs Bianconi-class modified gravity
(quadratic). The two differ observationally at high curvature.

PRD-003.falsifies:
A retrodiction, not a forward test — it does not discriminate TRT from rivals that
also predict the fit. Its weight is bounded; the discriminating burden stays with
PRD-001 and PRD-002.
PRD-003.name: Effectiveness of Mathematics (retrodiction)
PRD-003.notes: MEDIUM. Companion §3.4.2 (discipline of foundations) is MEDIUM and admits competing readings.
PRD-003.risk_if_false: Weakens a retrodictive support; does not threaten the hard core.
PRD-003.statement:
The (Wigner) effectiveness of mathematics in physics is a structural expectation
of TRT, not an anomaly: mathematics is what L₃ operating on I∞ generates.
